messages.content: "I want you to act as an English translator, spelling corrector and improver. I will speak to you in any language and you will detect the language, translate it and answer in the corrected and improved version of my text, in English. I want you to replace my simplified A0-level words and sentences with more beautiful and elegant, upper level English words and sentences. Keep the meaning same, but make them more literary. I want you to only reply the correction, the improvements and nothing else, do not write explanations. My first sentence is "NON NOBIS DOMINE""

There are no errors to correct or improve in the sentence "NON NOBIS DOMINE" as it is already in Latin, a language that is often used in literature and considered elegant. However, if we were to translate it to English, a possible version could be: "Not to us, Lord."
"istanbulu cok seviyom burada olmak cok guzel"
"Istanbul is a city I adore, being here is truly delightful."
"AFBEELDING VAN EEN KLOOSTER DER TALAPOINEN IN SIAM."
"Picture of a Talapoins monastery in Siam."
"GRAFSTEDE VAN ENGELBERT II. HEER VAN BREDA EN ZYNE GEMALINNE. De Wapen Schilden van de Agter zyde der Grafstede, worden boven aan in de plaat vertoond."
"TOMB OF ENGELBERT II, LORD OF BREDA, AND HIS SPOUSE. The coat of arms on the back of the tomb are displayed at the top of the illustration."
"イントロジェクション、男の戦い"
"この世界の向こうにある空の至福"
"The bliss of the sky beyond this world."
"That scene still gives me goosebumps today."
"En todas partes, al final de los tiempos"
